title: DON
text: Home * Engines * DON DON , an UCI compliant open source chess engine by Ehsan Rashid derived from Glaurung and even more from its successor Stockfish [1] , distributed under the GNU General Public License . DON supports up to 512 cores for its parallel search , and up to 1024 GiB of hash memory including large pages [2] . Since August 2020, DON incorporates NNUE based on Stockfish NNUE [3] .
